name: Resolve planning questions
description: Auto-resolve the interactive planning-questions step of agent validation by answering with stored context.

steps.label: پاسخ به سوالات برنامه‌ریزی و ادامه

content_md: When the run state shows the wizard-planning-questions marker, auto-answer the planning questions using stored create payload and resume validation via the wizard.resolve_planning bridge.
